function.name: grep
function.description: Search files under a directory for regex patterns. Returns matched files, line numbers, and context around matches. TIPS: 1) Escape special regex chars: ( ) [ ] { } + * ? ^ $ | . \ 2) Use \b for word boundaries (e.g., '\bfunction\b' matches 'function' but not 'malfunction'). 3) Results are capped - make queries specific to avoid truncation. 4) Use simple patterns when possible - complex regex may fail.

queries.description: Array of regex patterns to search for
